com.societegenerale.failover.core.expiry.FailoverExpiryExtractor

Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.expiry
Expiry policy and extractor abstractions for controlling cached payload lifetime.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable
Observable SPI and core implementations for the failover lifecycle.

  • Uses of FailoverExpiryExtractor in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration

    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration that return FailoverExpiryExtractor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FailoverExpiryExtractor
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverExpiryExtractor()
    Creates the failover expiry extractor bean.
    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration with parameters of type FailoverExpiryExtractor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ExpiryPolicy<Object>
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.defaultExpiryPolicy(FailoverClock clock, FailoverExpiryExtractor failoverExpiryExtractor)
    Creates the default expiry policy bean.
    FailoverHandler<Object>
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverHandler(KeyGenerator keyGenerator, ExpiryPolicy<Object> expiryPolicy, FailoverClock clock, FailoverStore<Object> failoverStore, PayloadEnricher<Object> payloadEnricher, RecoveredPayloadHandler recoveredPayloadHandler, CompositeObservablePublisher observablePublisher, FailoverExpiryExtractor failoverExpiryExtractor, PayloadSplitterLookup<Object,Object> payloadSplitterLookup, ContextPropagator contextPropagator, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<org.springframework.core.task.TaskExecutor> scatterGatherExecutorProvider, FailoverProperties failoverProperties)
    Assembles the full FailoverHandler decorator chain: AdvancedFailoverHandler(ScatterGatherFailoverHandler(DefaultFailoverHandler)).
    FailoverMeterBinder
    FailoverMicrometerAutoConfiguration.failoverMeterBinder(FailoverScanner failoverScanner, FailoverExpiryExtractor expiryExtractor)
    Binds failover.registered.total and per-failover failover.config.expiry.seconds gauges to the registry.
    FailoverObserver
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverObserver(CompositeObservablePublisher observablePublisher, FailoverScanner failoverScanner, FailoverClock clock, ManifestInfoExtractor manifestInfoExtractor, FailoverExpiryExtractor failoverExpiryExtractor, FailoverProperties failoverProperties)
    Creates the failover reporter bean that publishes a startup summary.

  • Uses of FailoverExpiryExtractor in com.societegenerale.failover.core.expiry

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.core.expiry that implement FailoverExpiryExtractor
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractFailoverExpiryExtractor
    Base FailoverExpiryExtractor that resolves expiry configuration from a @Failover annotation, preferring SpEL expression attributes over the literal numeric ones.
    class 
    BasicFailoverExpiryExtractor
    AbstractFailoverExpiryExtractor that interprets expression strings as plain literals: durations are parsed with Long.parseLong(java.lang.String, int) and units with ChronoUnit.valueOf(java.lang.String).

  • Uses of FailoverExpiryExtractor in com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable

    Constructors in com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable with parameters of type FailoverExpiryExtractor
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    DefaultFailoverObserver(ObservablePublisher observablePublisher, FailoverScanner failoverScanner, FailoverClock clock, ManifestInfoExtractor manifestInfoExtractor, FailoverExpiryExtractor failoverExpiryExtractor, Map<String,String> additionalInfo)
    Creates a reporter with all required collaborators.

  • Uses of FailoverExpiryExtractor in com.societegenerale.failover.lookup

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.lookup that implement FailoverExpiryExtractor
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BeanFactoryFailoverExpiryExtractor
    AbstractFailoverExpiryExtractor that resolves expiry expressions via Spring's ConfigurableBeanFactory.resolveEmbeddedValue(java.lang.String), supporting property placeholders (e.g.
